tools.name: kb_read
tools.description: Read the contents of a knowledge base note.

path.description: Note path relative to the sandbox root (use ./ prefix)

tools.name: kb_read_lines
tools.description: Read a range of lines from a knowledge base note with line numbers. Returns lines in the format {line_number}|{content}. Use this instead of kb_read when you only need a specific portion of a note to reduce context usage.

path.description: Note path relative to the sandbox root (use ./ prefix)

start_line.description: Line number to start reading at (1-indexed, inclusive)

end_line.description: Line number to end reading at (1-indexed, inclusive). Defaults to start_line (single line read) if omitted.

tools.name: kb_list
tools.description: List files and directories at a given path in the knowledge base. When an AGENTS.md file exists in the listed directory, its contents are automatically appended to the listing as a context section — this is not part of the ls output but an automatic context-loading feature.

path.description: Directory path relative to the sandbox root (use ./ prefix)

long.description: Show detailed format with permissions, size, and dates

tools.name: kb_search
tools.description: Search note contents for a pattern using grep. Returns matching lines with context.

path.description: Note or directory path relative to the sandbox root (use ./ prefix)

recursive.description: Search directories recursively. On by default — set to false only when searching a single note path.

files_only.description: Show only file names that contain matches, not the matching lines

tools.name: kb_write
tools.description: Write content to a knowledge base note. Creates the note if it does not exist, overwrites if it does. Parent directories are created automatically if they do not exist.

path.description: Note path relative to the sandbox root (use ./ prefix)

content.description: Full note content in markdown format including YAML frontmatter

tools.name: kb_write_lines
tools.description: Replace a range of lines in a knowledge base note without rewriting the entire note. Lines outside the range are preserved unchanged. Returns a diff showing removed lines (-prefix), added lines (+prefix), and surrounding context so you can verify the edit. Use this instead of kb_write for targeted edits to large notes.

path.description: Note path relative to the sandbox root (use ./ prefix)

start_line.description: Line number to start replacing at (1-indexed, inclusive)

end_line.description: Line number to end replacing at (1-indexed, inclusive). Defaults to start_line (single line replacement) if omitted.

original_content.description: The content currently at [start_line, end_line]. The tool verifies this matches the file before applying the patch, using a four-stage comparison: exact match, NFC normalization, Unicode-to-ASCII folding (for smart quotes, dashes, etc.), and trailing-whitespace tolerance with automatic preservation — if the only difference is trailing whitespace, the file's original trailing whitespace is preserved in the replacement. If it doesn't match, the edit is rejected with the expected vs actual content — re-read the note and retry.

content.description: Replacement content for the specified line range

tools.name: kb_replace
tools.description: Replace all occurrences of a pattern in a knowledge base note. Supports capture groups ($1-$9) in the replacement string. Returns a diff of changes made. The pattern is matched against the full note content with multiline mode enabled (^ and $ match line boundaries). Use this instead of multiple kb_write_lines calls when the same edit applies to many locations in one note.

path.description: Note path relative to the sandbox root (use ./ prefix)

pattern.description: Search pattern (extended regex). Matched against the full note content with multiline mode (^ and $ match line boundaries). \n matches newlines, enabling multi-line patterns and line deletion.

replacement.description: Replacement string. Supports $1-$9 for capture group references. Use $$ for a literal $. Use an empty string to delete matches.

line_numbers.description: Show line numbers in the returned diff (default: true)

tools.name: kb_append
tools.description: Append content to an existing knowledge base note. Creates the note if it does not exist.

path.description: Note path relative to the sandbox root (use ./ prefix)

content.description: Content to append to the note

tools.name: kb_delete
tools.description: Delete a knowledge base note. Refuses to delete directories.

path.description: Note path relative to the sandbox root (use ./ prefix)

tools.name: kb_delete_dir
tools.description: Delete an empty directory in the knowledge base. Refuses to delete non-empty directories or files.

path.description: Directory path relative to the sandbox root (use ./ prefix)
